free_text: Production of 77-Br by various nuclear reactions
For 16 MeV protons and 40 and 20 MeV
Kr-76 and Kr-77 were measured after being
The target unit for stacks were prepared as follow-
for the Se+p and As+alpha reactions, uniform layers of
Ba-Se-O/3 and Mg/2-As/2-O/7, respectively, made by
precipitation from their acetonic suspensions were
dried and sealed in aluminum foils. For the Br+p
reaction, powder of Na-Br was pressed into disks and
sealed in aluminum foil envelopes. Thicknesses of the
layers or disks were 10-100 mg/cm2 for barium salt,
10-20 mg/cm2 for 'As' salt, 200-250 mg/cm2 for Na-Br.
The absolute cross section might involve
up to 25% error owing to uncertainties in target
thickness, current integrator reading and gamma-ray
should be taken into account in non-destructive
